_meta.author: kokonutd
_meta.title: AI Voice Input
_meta.description:
A voice input component with an animated visualizer and recording timer. It includes a demo mode, customizable visualizer, and recording callbacks.

Features:
	•	Animated audio visualizer
	•	Recording timer display
	•	Demo/preview mode
	•	Start/stop callbacks
	•	Dark mode support
	•	Customizable visualizer bars
	•	Mobile responsive
